use_cases: Landing page hero section with animated wave background
Full-viewport canvas animation for marketing sites
Dynamic background for SaaS product pages
Ambient animated background for media/entertainment platforms
Visual interest layer for dark-themed landing pages
ai_summary: A full-viewport animated canvas background that renders flowing wave patterns using pre-computed sin/cos lookup tables for performance. Features time-based animation with blue and purple color accents creating a mesmerizing, continuously morphing gradient effect. Designed as a hero background for landing pages and marketing sites, optimized for visual impact without scroll interactions.
